# career-ops-kr

Version: 0.2.0
Author: 이찬희 (pollmap, Luxon AI) <pollmap@luxon.ai>
License: MIT
Purpose: Korean-first AI job-hunt automation agent. Ports the santifer/career-ops
  philosophy (mode separation + HITL + profile-centric) to the Korean market
  (finance/fintech/blockchain) with multi-domain preset support.

## Key invariants

- UTF-8 encoding mandatory on all file I/O (encoding='utf-8', pathlib.Path, no cp949)
- User/System layer separation: system updates MUST NOT touch User files
  (cv.md, config/profile.yml, config/portals.yml, config/qualifier_rules.yml,
   config/scoring_weights.yml, modes/_profile.md, data/*)
- No mock data / hallucinations: crawl failure = record as failure, never synthesize
- HITL 5 gates: G1 onboarding, G2 archetype change, G3 tracker merge,
  G4 batch eval >=5, G5 auto-submit permanently forbidden
- MCP-first: reuse Nexus MCP tools (vault_*, discord_*) when available
- Scope discipline: do not expand beyond what was requested

## Entry points

- CLI: `career-ops` (see career_ops_kr/cli.py)
- MCP server: `python -m career_ops_kr.mcp_server` (10 tools)
- TUI dashboard: `career-ops ui` (Textual-based)

## Modes (16 total)

Phase 1 (MVP):    scan, filter, score, pipeline, tracker, patterns, auto-pipeline
Phase 2:          pdf, interview-prep, apply, followup, project, batch
Phase 3:          training, deep, contacto
Korean locale:    modes/kr/*

## Presets (7 domains)

finance (default), dev, design, marketing, research, public, edu
See presets/*.yml — each preset is config-only; engine code is shared.

## Channels (v0.2 — 9 MVP + 9 stubs)

MVP (implemented): linkareer, jobalio, yw_work24, shinhan_sec, kiwoomda,
  kofia, dataq, apply_bok, wanted
Sprint 3 stubs: 9 Tier 3-4 channels (to be filled by contributors)

Channel priority: RSS/API > requests+bs4 > scrapling > playwright

## References

- CLAUDE.md — agent instructions (User/System separation, HITL gates)
- CONTRIBUTING.md — how to contribute safely
- docs/generalization.md — how the system is multi-domain
- docs/presets.md — preset catalog
- docs/adding-a-preset.md — how to add a new domain
- docs/README.ko.md, README.en.md, README.ja.md — multi-language docs
- CHANGELOG.md — version history
- tests/ — regression dataset with real Korean HTML captures

## Philosophy

- Built for one real person's real job hunt, then generalized
- Korean finance first, but domain-agnostic engine
- Human-in-the-loop always; never auto-apply
- Real data only; failure is logged, never faked
